response.justification: Candidate brings 20 years of strong software engineering experience and current exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks), but falls short on critical GenAI requirements. The resume lacks Python entirely, shows minimal AI/LLM experience (only ~2 months in current role), and contains no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks—all core to the role. While recent AI infrastructure work is promising, the candidate appears to be transitioning into GenAI rather than bringing the required 8+ years of production AI solution expertise.
strengths: 20+ years shipping production systems across multiple domains with proven ability to lead at staff level
Current MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI infrastructure work directly aligns with job's technical direction
Strong TypeScript and AWS cloud platform expertise with demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly
concerns: Python is completely absent from resume despite being an explicit required language alongside TypeScript
Only ~2 months visible AI/GenAI experience versus job requirement of minimum 8 years building production-grade AI solutions
No demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLMs, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
